```python
import requests

message_ids = ["msg_001", "msg_002", "msg_006", "msg_007"]
for mid in message_ids:
    resp = requests.post(
        "http://localhost:50267/gmail/messages/get",
        json={"message_id": mid}
    )
    print(f"\n=== {mid} ===")
    print(resp.text)
